feed.title: Minchin.ca - Comments: 3D Printing and Model Trains

entry.title: Posted by: PuzzleShed
entry.summary:
We are finding some of our 3D Printer customers using their THREEDY 3D Printers for producing their Model Railway models. Some such models will be on display at the National Model Engineering & Modelling Exhibition next weekend (Doncaster, UK)
Here's our blog post on the subject: http://threedyprinters.com/printed-by-threedy …
entry.content:
We are finding some of our 3D Printer customers using their THREEDY 3D Printers for producing their Model Railway models. Some such models will be on display at the National Model Engineering & Modelling Exhibition next weekend (Doncaster, UK)
Here's our blog post on the subject: http://threedyprinters.com/printed-by-threedy/modelrailway/

entry.title: Posted by: PROTIK KHAN
entry.summary: this is very nice post thanks for sharing.
entry.content: this is very nice post thanks for sharing.
